title: RAF Lossiemouth Incident: Controlled Blast Reveals No Threat

sections.heading: Incident Overview
sections.content: On March 13, RAF Lossiemouth responded to a report concerning a suspicious package on the base. In response to the potential threat, a bomb disposal team was deployed.

sections.heading: Controlled Explosion
sections.content: The bomb squad carried out a controlled explosion on the package. Following this operation, authorities confirmed that there was no threat to safety.

sections.heading: Flight Operations
sections.content: Normal flight operations resumed promptly after the incident was assessed, ensuring that air traffic continued without disruption.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – RAF Lossiemouth Alert: Controlled Blast Finds No Threat, March 13
